title: VATIN Double Face Navy Blue Satin Ribbon 6mm X 22m,Blue Polyester Fabric Ribbon use for Bows Bouquet, Gift Wrapping, Floral Arrangement Wedding Decoration
features: Size: 6mm in width and continuous 22m in length per spool; features 100% continuous length without splices for consistent use
Quality Material: Made from 100% polyester with a double-faced satin finish; features stitched edges to prevent fraying; both sides have a smooth, glossy texture that does not require ironing
Durability: Polyester satin ribbon is thick and robust, with beautifully stitched edges to prevent tearing; machine-washable and resistant to fading; suitable for outdoor use

Versatile Application: Ideal for a range of projects including crafting exquisite Christmas ornaments, gift wrapping, wedding invitations, headbands, bridal bouquet, sewing, corset lacing, gift wrapping, hair bows, home decoration, handmade craft project etc; available in classic colors to suit diverse creative needs
User Friendly: Features a smooth, wrinkle-free surface that requires no ironing; comes on a plastic roll spool with protective outer tape to keep the ribbon clean and easy to store
